features: HAND WASH: Antibacterial moisture hand wash with added moisturisers - 2 hour protection cleans, cares and protects hands, leaving them soft and smooth
MOISTURISER: This liquid hand soap is enriched with Vitamin E, an essential ingredient for healthy skin - leaves hands feeling cared
ANTIBACTERIAL HAND WASH: Carex experts developed this hand wash to kill 99.9 percent of bacteria whilst protecting skin's natural antibacterial defences for up to 2 hours after washing
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED: Our hand wash is vegan and dermatologically accredited by the skin health alliance
BULK BUY: This pack of 6 x 500 ml bottles of protect original hand wash is a great bulk buy suitable for the whole family - home essentials for any kitchen and bathroom
description: Product Description Washing your hands with Carex is one of the easiest ways to help protect yourself and others from illnesses. Our range of antibacterial liquid hand wash is created from a trusted and expertly made formulation which cleans and cares for your skin. HAND WASH: Antibacterial Moisture Hand Wash with added moisturisers to care and clean for your hands. This liquid hand soap is enriched with Vitamin E for skincare, an essential ingredient for healthy skin leaving hands feeling soft and cared for. Carex Dermacare hand wash soap formula supports the skin's natural antibacterial defences, it doesn't just clean your hands, but cares and protects them too. Always practice good hand hygiene with this liquid hand soap; it protects your skin's natural antibacterial defences for to 2 hours after washing. Carex experts have developed this hand wash formula to kill 99.9% of bacteria with every wash. Our hand wash is vegan & dermatologically accredited by the Skin Health Alliance. This pack of 6 x 250ml bottles of Protect Moisture Hand Wash is a great bulk buy suitable for the whole family - home essentials. Carex Moisture Hand Wash makes a great self care gift for anyone who cares about their well being.
